headline: 🚀 Week of Mar 23-29: Claude Code Goes Auto Mode, Anthropic Leaks Next Model, and the Agent Layer Is Eating Software

picks.name: Claude Code Auto Mode
picks.tagline: Claude can now execute tasks without you babysitting every step
picks.summary: Anthropic dropped auto mode for Claude Code—it'll run actions with fewer manual approvals while safeguards check for destructive behavior. Literally game-changing for devs who are tired of clicking 'approve' a thousand times.

picks.name: Atomic Chat
picks.tagline: Private AI that runs 100% on your device, zero data sent anywhere
picks.summary: Your own offline chatbot fr—no tracking, no cloud uploads, completely free. Perfect if you're paranoid about privacy or just want AI that actually stays local.

picks.name: Meshy 3D Model Generation
picks.tagline: Turn any photo into a print-ready 3D model in minutes
picks.summary: Bambu Lab integrated Meshy into MakerWorld—snap a pic, get a STL file ready to print. No CAD skills needed, lowkey magic for makers and designers.

picks.name: Beehiiv MCP Integration
picks.tagline: Manage your newsletter through Claude and other AI agents
picks.summary: Newsletter creators can now use AI agents to analyze subscriber lists, manage outreach, and more via MCP. Basically your newsletter on autopilot with smarter agents doing the heavy lifting.

watchNext.title: Anthropic's Leaked Model (Mythos/Capybara)
watchNext.why: Accidentally exposed details on an unreleased model above Opus with insanely better reasoning and coding scores. The hype is real and everyone's losing it.

watchNext.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Generating Websites in Real Time
watchNext.why: Google dropped a lightweight model that builds entire websites dynamically on the fly. No pre-built pages, just pure generation. Lowkey the vibe coding future we've been waiting for.
